D1 Optics L1 Identify Atom

Anatomy of a Sine Wave

drag three sliders — amplitude, wavelength, phase — and watch each parameter reshape the same curve

Every periodic wave can be described by three numbers: how tall, how long, and where its cycle begins.

Slide the amplitude to make the wave taller. Slide the wavelength to stretch one cycle wider. Slide the phase to shift the whole curve left or right.
